questions.q: Which new Castlevania game, set in 1499 Paris, was revealed with a gameplay trailer during the Triple-i Initiative Showcase?
questions.correctText: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse is set to launch in 2026 and features combat against corrupted historical figures like Joan of Arc.

questions.q: What is the name of the new Don't Starve game announced during the Triple-i Initiative Showcase, which introduces new environments and terrain mechanics like hills?
questions.correctText: Don't Starve Elsewhere was revealed with a world premiere trailer, promising new biomes, magical elements, and a multi-tiered wilderness.

questions.q: The creators of the popular Minecraft mod 'Create' have been hired by which upcoming game studio?
questions.correctText: The developers behind the extensive Minecraft 'Create' mod have been hired by Hytale, suggesting a focus on automation and complex systems in the upcoming game.

questions.q: Which of these games had its Early Access release date trailer shown during The Triple-i Initiative showcase on April 9, 2026?
questions.correctText: Alabaster Dawn, an action RPG from the creators of CrossCode, had its Early Access release date trailer shown, with the game set to launch on May 7, 2026.

questions.q: Road to Vostok, a hardcore survival shooter, recently had a successful launch on Steam. What is a key feature of this game according to its description?
options: It features a procedurally generated fantasy world.
It is a single-player survival game set in a post-apocalyptic border zone.
It is primarily a story-driven RPG with minimal combat.
questions.correctText: Road to Vostok is described as a hardcore single-player survival game set in a post-apocalyptic border zone between Finland and Russia.
